title: lepidagathis angustifolia
intro: Lepidagathis angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Lepidagathis or Anjali, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are known to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lepidagathis angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
